---
title: "The Rev. Charles Yonge"
---

## The Rev. Charles Yonge

**Dates:** (14 May 1781-July 1830)

### Description

uncle of CMY, master at Eton

### Biography

He married (4 Dec 1810) Elizabeth Lord (d. 11 Jan 1868).  He was father of Charles Duke Yonge, the writer (whom CMY never mentions, why?) and of the Rev. John Eyre Yonge.

### Letters

- Letter from June 9, 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
